title: 10D9N Autumn Holiday in Australia 2026
details: Highlights: Sydney Opera House, Blue Mountains, Featherdale Wildlife Park, Canberra Parliament House, Melbourne City Tour, Yarra Valley, Puffing Billy Train, and Tesselaar KBloom Fields of Flowers (Holy Week Special).
flyer: assets/data/packages/oceania/Autumn Holidays in Australia 2026/Autumn Holidays in Australia 2026.pdf
travel_dates: 🍁 APR 03 – 12, 2026 — $2,950 (Holy Week & with Tesselaar KBloom Fields of Flower)

itinerary.day_details:
Meet at NAIA Terminal 1 for airline check-in. Enjoy flight amenities, meals, and onboard entertainment while flying to Sydney.

Flight: PR211 Manila–Sydney | 10:10 PM – 9:45 AM (+1)

itinerary.day_title: Day 02: Arrival in Sydney – City Tour (Lunch/Dinner)
itinerary.day_details:
Welcome to Sydney! Meet your tour coach and guide at the airport.

Proceed with a Sydney City Tour featuring: The Rocks Historic Area, Sydney Opera House, Conservatorium of Music, Hyde Park, St. Mary’s Cathedral (photo stop), Parliament House, Art Gallery of New South Wales, Royal Botanic Garden, Darling Harbour, Sydney Tower, and Macquarie’s Chair.

Enjoy a Sydney Harbour Lunch Cruise. Dinner and overnight stay in Sydney.

itinerary.day_title: Day 03: Blue Mountains & Featherdale Wildlife Park (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner)
itinerary.day_details:
After breakfast, visit the UNESCO World Heritage–listed Blue Mountains.

See the famous Three Sisters Rock Formation and enjoy Scenic World rides including the Skyway, Scenic Railway, and Cableway.

Continue to Featherdale Wildlife Park to encounter native Australian animals. Dinner and overnight stay in Sydney.

itinerary.day_title: Day 04: Sealife Aquarium & Madame Tussauds / Birkenhead Outlet (Breakfast/Lunch)
itinerary.day_details:
After breakfast, visit Sealife Aquarium, home to thousands of marine creatures, followed by Madame Tussauds Wax Museum at Darling Harbour.

After lunch, enjoy shopping at Birkenhead Point Factory Outlet, featuring over 120 international brands.

Return to the hotel for overnight stay.

After breakfast, check out and travel approximately 3 hours to Canberra.

Enjoy a city tour visiting the Australian Parliament House, Australian War Memorial, and a scenic drive through Yarralumla, one of Canberra’s most prestigious suburbs.

Hotel check-in and dinner in Canberra.

After breakfast, check out and proceed to Melbourne via scenic countryside drive (approximately 6 hours).

Lunch en route at own expense.

Arrive in Melbourne, check in to hotel, freshen up, and enjoy buffet dinner.

After breakfast, enjoy a full-day Melbourne City Tour.

Visit highlights including Lygon Street, Melbourne University, Royal Exhibition Buildings, Parliament House, St. Patrick’s Cathedral (photo stop), Captain Cook’s Cottage, Fitzroy Gardens, Flinders Street Station, Federation Square, Hosier Lane, and ACDC Lane.

Return to hotel after dinner.

itinerary.day_title: Day 08: Yarra Valley – Tesselaar Kabloom & Puffing Billy (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner)
itinerary.day_details:
After breakfast, drive through the picturesque Dandenong Ranges.

Visit the vibrant Tesselaar Kabloom Festival (exclusive for April 03–12, 2026 departure).

Ride the iconic Puffing Billy steam train through lush rainforest landscapes.

Continue to Yarra Valley for wine tasting at Rochford Winery and chocolate sampling at Yarra Valley Chocolaterie.

Dinner and return to hotel.

After breakfast, enjoy a full day of leisure.

Free time for shopping, sightseeing, or optional tours at your own pace.

Overnight stay in Melbourne.

Early morning check-out. Box breakfast will be provided.

Transfer to Melbourne Airport for departure back to Manila.

Flight: PR210 Melbourne–Manila | 8:00 AM – 1:35 PM

Arrive in Manila. Home sweet home!

inclusions: 3 nights hotel accommodation in Sydney (Tankstream Hotel)
4 nights accommodation in Melbourne (Holiday Inn Express – Little Collins)
Fully loaded tours as per itinerary
Private coach for airport and tour transfers
Admissions: Scenic World (Skyway, Railway, Cableway), Sealife Aquarium, Madame Tussauds, Puffing Billy Train, and Tesselaar Kabloom (for April 03–12, 2026 departure)
exclusions: Mandatory tipping for guide and driver: $80 ($10 per person/day)
extra_details: Mode of Payment: $300 first down payment, $300 second month, full payment 45 days before departure.
All down payments are non-refundable. Full cancellation charges apply for cancellations made 30 days before flight.
For rebooking due to government restrictions or force majeure, subject to airline and hotel policies.
Full cancellation charges any cancellation made 30 days
For Force Majeur and Gov't Restrictions, for rebooking only
Subject to Hotel and Airlines policy and availability
